tasks.title: M' Surface Ownership Matrix
tasks.body:
1. **T0 - M' Surface Ownership Matrix**

   Canonical source: `Idea/Bimba/Seeds/ARCHITECTURE-DIAGRAM-PACK.md`, `Idea/Bimba/Seeds/M/M'-SYSTEM-SPEC.md`
   Cycle 1 substrate inheritance: `Idea/Bimba/Seeds/M/Legacy/plans/2026-06-02-m-prime-cycle-1-close/SPRINT.md` is the only cycle 1 closing artifact; every cycle 2 track must inherit from it rather than rediscovering landed work.

   Deliverables:

   - Map every M' surface to an owning cycle 2 track: Electron/Theia shell, `/body` `0/1`, `/` OmniPanel operator membrane, shell `1` flow-writing surface, M0-M5 subsystem pages, six extensions, `1-2-3`, `4-5-0`, Agentic Control Room, constitutional/ta-onta surfaces, review/autoresearch UX.
   - Map every S/S' surface to either `consumed contract`, `integration gap`, or `already-landed substrate`.
   - Fail the matrix if any carrier, constitutional agent, Aletheia subagent, extension, plugin, or shell surface is ambient.

   Verification:

   - `node .codex/scripts/m-dev-plan-assess.mjs --reset --write --json docs/plans/2026-06-02-m-prime-cycle-2-canonical`
   - Every non-overview track below is referenced by this ownership matrix.

tasks.body:
2. **T1 - Cycle 1 Substrate Inheritance Registry**

   Canonical source: `Idea/Bimba/Seeds/M/Legacy/plans/2026-06-02-m-prime-cycle-1-close/SPRINT.md`, `Idea/Bimba/Seeds/S/S-SOURCE-TRACEABILITY-INDEX.md`
   Cycle 1 substrate inheritance: applies to `Body/S/S0`, `Body/S/S1`, `Body/S/S2`, `Body/S/S3`, `Body/S/S4`, `Body/S/S5`, `Idea/Pratibimba/System`, and `Body/M/epi-tauri`.

   Deliverables:

   - Register each cycle 1 landed surface as `consume as-is`, `audit/verify`, or `extend`.
   - Record the explicit user caveat that Track 13 was still underway when cycle 1 was closed.
   - Prevent cycle 2 tracks from claiming first-build ownership over already-landed substrate.

   Verification:

   - Every cycle 2 track includes a `Cycle 1 substrate inheritance:` line.
   - No cycle 2 tranche describes major `S/S'` work as greenfield unless it is a real missing gap.

tasks.title: M' First Execution Sequence
tasks.body:
3. **T2 - M' First Execution Sequence**

   Canonical source: `Idea/Bimba/Seeds/M/M'-SYSTEM-SPEC.md`, `Idea/Bimba/Seeds/M/M'-PORTAL-SPEC.md`
   Cycle 1 substrate inheritance: cycle 1 sequencing is historical evidence only and is not binding on cycle 2.

   Deliverables:

   - Define the opening sequence as: shell/runtime ownership, M0-M5 surfaces, integrated plugins, constitutional/agentic mediation, then substrate gap closure.
   - Keep `S/S'` tracks dependency-driven and subordinate to actual M' integration failures.
   - Explicitly forbid another pseudo-greenfield S-layer cycle.

   Verification:

   - `node .codex/scripts/m-dev-plan-assess.mjs --route --write --json docs/plans/2026-06-02-m-prime-cycle-2-canonical`
   - The recommended route starts with M' ownership and only then consumed-substrate closure.

## T0 Ownership Matrix

### M' Product Surfaces

| Surface family | Primary owner | Scope anchored here | Cycle 1 inheritance stance |
|---|---|---|---|
| Electron-hosted [[Theia]] shell, `0/1` parent faces, `/body`, `/`, deep IDE, packaging/runtime lifecycle | `01.T0` through `01.T6` | Real desktop runtime, layout switching, summon/return, `/` as operator membrane, release discipline | extend |
| [[M0']] Bimba map subsystem | `02.T0` through `02.T4` | Readable graph, inspector depth, source traceability, route-to-action surfaces | extend |
| [[M1']] Paramasiva subsystem | `03.T0` through `03.T4` | Played traversal, interval grammar, profile-to-performance stream, topology/pairing surfaces | extend |
| [[M2']] Parashakti subsystem | `04.T0` through `04.T5` | Meaning packet, 72-fold correspondence tree, routing protocol, cymatic render, resonance inspector | extend |
| [[M3']] Mahamaya subsystem | `05.T0` through `05.T5` | Clock-cosmos surface, codon rotation, multi-matrix inspector, Janus temporal doorway | extend |
| [[M4']] Nara subsystem | `06.T0` through `06.T5` | Shell `1` flow-writing input, journal/daily/dream/oracle, protected field, quaternion source, dialogue governance | extend |
| [[M5']] Epii subsystem | `07.T0` through `07.T5` | Library, canon studio, backend/frontend studios, Agentic Control Room, review/autoresearch UX | extend |
| Integrated `1-2-3` cosmic engine plugin | `08.T0` through `08.T2` | Product surface over [[M1']], [[M2']], [[M3']] including shell `0` preview responsibility | extend |
| Integrated `4-5-0` recognition plugin | `09.T0` through `09.T2` | Product surface over [[M4']], [[M5']], [[M0']] including shell `1` flow preview, `4+2` recognition depth, privacy, and review seams | extend |
| ta-onta carriers, constitutional agents, Aletheia subagents | `10.T0` through `10.T18` | Explicit owner map for carriers, agents, deposits, review boundaries, and subagent roles | extend |
| Gateway method map and intent-routing grammar | `13.T0` through `13.T5` | Product integration infrastructure for aliasing, operator command catalog, direct agent/session transparency, deep links, privacy/review interrupts | audit/verify then extend |
| Open decisions, release gates, final no-orphan audit | `14.T0` through `14.T5` | IOD/PRD/UFV/DCC matrices, release gates, canonical no-orphan closure | audit/verify then extend |

### Consumed S/S' Substrate Matrix

| Substrate family | Classification in cycle 2 | Primary cycle 2 owner | Why it is not greenfield |
|---|---|---|---|
| [[S0]] / [[S0']] command membrane, kernel/profile bridge, CLI and schema surfaces | consumed contract | `11.T0` plus `13.T0`-`13.T5` for method parity | Cycle 1 already landed pointer/profile/bridge substrate and shell-facing contract packages |
| [[S1]] / [[S1']] vault, DAY/NOW material plane, [[Hen]] compiler/write law | consumed contract | `11.T1`-`11.T2` | Cycle 1 already landed real vault writes, rename/move integrity, and Hen public surfaces |
| [[S2]] / [[S2']] graph schema, retrieval, map services, semantic cache law | consumed contract | `11.T3`-`11.T4` | Cycle 1 already landed graph API parity, dataset population, retrieval, and M5 consumer contracts |
| [[S3]] / [[S3']] gateway, sessions, SpaceTimeDB, Graphiti, temporal runtime | consumed contract | `12.T0` and `12.T3` | Cycle 1 already landed gateway contract freeze, runtime state authority, DAY/NOW/session projection, and lifecycle substrate |
| [[S4]] / [[S4']] capability matrix, VAK/orchestration substrate, ta-onta runtime | consumed contract | `12.T1` with explicit ontology ownership in `10.T0`-`10.T18` | Cycle 1 already landed mediation, bounded runtime authority, VAK lineage, and capability-matrix parity |
| [[S5]] / [[S5']] review, autoresearch, gnosis, pedagogy, Epii return law | consumed contract | `12.T2` plus product surfacing in `07.*`, `09.*`, `14.*` | Cycle 1 already landed review/autoresearch cores, IDE contracts, and agent-return routes |
| Cross-coordinate gateway method catalog and product-native aliases | integration gap | `13.T0`-`13.T5` | Cycle 1 left parity and aliasing diffuse across shell, gateway, and review surfaces |
| Generic S-layer rebuild work | forbidden except where a concrete M' blocker is named | `11.T4`, `12.T4`, and `00.T2` guardrails | Cycle 2 inherits substantial live substrate and must only close named consumption gaps |

### No-Ambient Registry

| Canonical family | Owning track/tranche | Constraint |
|---|---|---|
| Six ta-onta carriers: [[Khora]], [[Hen]], [[Pleroma]], [[Chronos]], [[Anima]], [[Aletheia]] | `10.T1`-`10.T6` | No carrier may remain implied by substrate alone |
| Six constitutional agents: [[Nous]], [[Logos]], [[Eros]], [[Mythos]], [[Psyche]], [[Sophia]] | `10.T7`-`10.T12` | No constitutional role may remain dissolved into generic planning/execution/review language |
| Six Aletheia subagents: [[Anansi]], [[Moirai]], [[Janus]], [[Mercurius]], [[Agora]], [[Zeithoven]] | `10.T13`-`10.T18` | No subagent may remain an uncited background capability |
| [[Agentic Control Room]] and M5-4 operational capacities | `07.T4` | Product-facing mediation surfaces must be owned before ontology closure executes |
| Canonical no-orphan proof across shells, subsystems, extensions, plugins, ontology, lifecycle, and methods | `14.T5` | Final route must fail if any canonical surface lacks an owner |
| `0/1` versus `4+2` versus `/` separation | `01.*`, `06.*`, `09.*`, `13.*`, `14.T5` | Final route must fail if shell `1` flow, full `4+2` depth, or `/` operator transparency are collapsed into one another |

## T1 Substrate Inheritance Register

| Landed cycle 1 surface | Cycle 2 stance | Owning follow-on track |
|---|---|---|
| `Idea/Pratibimba/System/**` shell/runtime substrate | extend | `01.*` |
| `Body/M/epi-tauri/**` | consume as migration-source-only evidence | `01.T0` |
| `Body/S/S0` through `Body/S/S5` live substrate | consume as-is unless a real M' blocker appears | `11.*`, `12.*`, `13.*` |
| Track 13 modularity cleanup carry-forward | audit/verify then extend | `11.*`, `12.*`, `13.*`, `14.*` |

The explicit user caveat from cycle 1 remains binding here: Track 13 was still underway at close, so cycle 2 inherits a live continuation lane rather than a clean-room baseline.

### Cycle 1 Landing Classification Detail

| Cycle 1 surface | Evidence anchor | Cycle 2 classification | Guardrail |
|---|---|---|---|
| S0/S0' pointer-web, profile, CLI, readiness, bridge contract, and governed capability invocation | `Body/S/S0/epi-lib`, `Body/S/S0/portal-core`, `Body/S/S0/epi-cli`, `Body/S/S3/gateway-contract`; cycle 1 close Track 01 | consume as-is, then extend only where M' shell/method parity exposes a blocker | `11.T0` and `13.*` may close consumed contract gaps; no generic S0 rebuild |
| S1/S1' DAY/NOW, vault, semantic, rename/move, and Hen/write-law substrate | `Idea/Empty/Present`, `Body/S/S1/hen-compiler-core`, `Body/S/S0/epi-cli/src/vault`, `Body/S/S0/epi-cli/src/gate/s1_hen.rs`; cycle 1 close Track 03.6.5 and Track 13.8 | audit/verify then extend | preserve Hen/S1' authority; S0 may remain adapter only |
| S2/S2' graph schema, dataset import, retrieval, ontology, GDS overlay readiness, API parity, and M5 consumption contracts | `Body/S/S2/graph-schema`, `Body/S/S2/graph-services`, `Body/S/S2/ontology`; cycle 1 close Track 02 | consume as-is for M0/M5 and extension surfaces; audit blocked plugin/environment items | missing n10s/GDS/semantic-cache pieces are environment/integration blockers, not greenfield graph ownership |
| S3/S3' gateway, sessions, WebSocket multiplexer, SpaceTimeDB/shared-cosmos, Graphiti runtime, DAY/NOW/session projection, and soak/privacy evidence | `Body/S/S3/gateway-contract`, `Body/S/S3/gateway`, `Body/S/S3/epi-spacetime-module`, `Body/S/S3/graphiti-runtime`; cycle 1 close Track 03 | consume as-is | `12.T0`/`12.T3` may close shell/lifecycle consumption paths only |
| S4/S4' capability matrix, VAK/orchestration, mediation route, ta-onta runtime, Aletheia disclosure metadata, and M5-4 mediation substrate | `Body/S/S4/pi-agent`, `Body/S/S4/plugins/pleroma`, `Body/S/S4/ta-onta`; cycle 1 close Tracks 07/08/09/13 | consume as-is, then extend through explicit carrier/agent/subagent ownership | ontology ownership belongs to `10.*`; no ambient constitutional role remains acceptable |
| S5/S5' review/autoresearch stores, dry-run promotion, Epii access/deposit, gnosis/kbase hooks, IDE workbench contracts, and epi-logos plugin body | `Body/S/S5/**`, `Idea/Pratibimba/System/extensions/m5-epii`, `Body/S/S5/plugins/epi-logos`; cycle 1 close Track 04 and Track 09 | consume as-is for review/autoresearch/pedagogy consumers; extend only named missing method families | non-dry-run promotion, provider-backed Epii invocation, production Gnosis convergence, and missing teach/explain gateway methods stay explicit blockers |
| Electron/Theia shell, M0/M5 chrome, `/body` daily slice, integrated plugins, M-extension contributions, and release-gate harnesses | `Idea/Pratibimba/System/**`; cycle 1 close Tracks 07/08/10 | extend | Cycle 2 is product-first M' development over landed substrate, not a new S-stack pass |
| `Body/M/epi-tauri/**` migration source | `Body/M/epi-tauri/DEPRECATED.md`, decisions, contract inventory | consume as migration-source-only evidence | do not re-home runtime authority to deprecated Tauri code |
| Track 13 S/S' modularity cleanup | cycle 1 close Track 13 with `5` pending tranches at close | audit/verify then extend | live continuation caveat applies; cycle 2 cannot claim a clean-room baseline while Track 13 carry-forward remains active |

Anti-greenfield rule: any cycle 2 tranche touching `Body/S/S0` through `Body/S/S5`, `Idea/Pratibimba/System`, or `Body/M/epi-tauri` must phrase its work as `consume as-is`, `audit/verify`, or `extend`. A tranche may claim first-build ownership only for an M' product surface, a named carrier/agent/subagent owner, a method-routing closure, or a concrete integration blocker that the register above does not already classify as landed substrate.

## T2 First Execution Sequence

1. `00.*` establishes ownership, inheritance, and anti-greenfield guardrails.
2. `01.T0` locks Electron-hosted [[Theia]] and preserves `Body/M/epi-tauri` as migration-source-only.
3. `02.*` through `07.*` own the six M' subsystems as product surfaces.
4. `08.*` and `09.*` own the integrated plugin compositions rather than leaving them as spillover from subsystem work.
5. `07.T4` and `10.*` make M5-4 mediation plus carrier/agent/subagent ontology explicit.
6. `11.*`, `12.*`, and `13.*` close only the consumed-substrate and method-routing gaps exposed by product ownership.
7. `14.*` re-homes cross-cutting decisions, locks release gates, and performs the final no-orphan audit.

This sequence is load-bearing: cycle 2 starts from M' ownership, uses S/S' only as consumed infrastructure, and forbids another pseudo-greenfield S-layer pass.

tasks.title: Electron / Theia Runtime Boundary
tasks.body:
1. **T0 - Electron / Theia Runtime Boundary**

   Canonical source: `Idea/Bimba/Seeds/M/M5'/m5-prime-system-shape-and-tauri-ide-canon.md`
   Cycle 1 substrate inheritance: extends `Idea/Pratibimba/System/**` and preserves `Body/M/epi-tauri/**` as migration-source-only evidence.

   Deliverables:

   - Lock Electron-hosted Theia as the actual desktop runtime and `Body/M/epi-tauri` as migration-source-only.
   - Name the process boundary, workspace/package layout, and runtime responsibilities of the shell.
   - Keep a single kernel-bridge and a single gateway/runtime stream across the whole shell.

   Substrate-truth note (2026-06-02):

   - `Idea/Pratibimba/System/README.md` already names the Theia IDE surface as the active executable home for M5-3 and `Idea/Pratibimba/System/electron-app/` is already present.
   - `Body/M/epi-tauri/DEPRECATED.md` already marks the Tauri tree as migration-source-only and explicitly forbids extending it.
   - The genuine remaining gap for this tranche is not shell greenfield. It is the operational lock-in proof: final runtime boundary wording, `epi app`/launch-path rewiring away from the deprecated tree, runnable Electron verification, and explicit proof that one kernel-bridge plus one gateway/runtime authority serve the whole shell.
   - Do not rebuild renderer/domain code from scratch. Port or re-home only what the migration inventory still marks as outstanding.

   Verification:

   - Theia/Electron app build passes in `Idea/Pratibimba/System`
   - shell runtime tests prove one bridge instance and one gateway/runtime authority
